# Predaja zadataka

Na ovoj stranici predajete zadatke.

<div class="upload-form">
  <h3>Predaja rješenja</h3>

  <input type="text" id="ime" placeholder="Ime">

  <input type="text" id="prezime" placeholder="Prezime">

  <input type="file" id="file">

  <button onclick="upload()">Pošalji rješenje</button>
</div>

<script type="module">
  import { createClient } from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js/+esm";

  const supabaseUrl = "https://jwsvnvvexmwnvjovdbyg.supabase.co";
  const supabaseKey = "sb_publishable_OJODRwGSdsFkc78-XMO_LQ__B_a2EJ3";

  const supabase = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseKey);

  window.upload = async function () {
    const ime = document.getElementById("ime").value.trim();
    const prezime = document.getElementById("prezime").value.trim();
    const file = document.getElementById("file").files[0];

    if (!ime || !prezime || !file) {
      alert("Popuni ime, prezime i odaberi file.");
      return;
    }

    function sanitize(str) {
      return str
        .normalize("NFD")
        .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")   // č ć š đ ž → c s d z
        .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, "_");  // sve ostalo → _
    }

    const imeSafe = sanitize(ime);
    const prezimeSafe = sanitize(prezime);

    const filePath = `${imeSafe}_${prezimeSafe}/${Date.now()}-${file.name.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9.\-_]/g, "_")}`;

    const { data, error } = await supabase.storage
      .from("submissions")
      .upload(filePath, file);

    if (error) {
      console.error("UPLOAD ERROR FULL:", error);
      alert(JSON.stringify(error));
      return;
    }

    const { data: dbData, error: dbError } = await supabase
      .from("predaje")
      .insert([
        {
          ime,
          prezime,
          datoteka: file.name,
          putanja: filePath
        }
      ])
      .select();

  console.log("DB DATA:", dbData);
  console.log("DB ERROR:", dbError);

  if (dbError) {
    alert("DB ERROR: " + JSON.stringify(dbError));
    return;
  }

alert("Spremljeno u bazu!");
    alert("Upload uspješan!");
    console.log("Upload data:", data);
  };
</script>
